meaning: n.[动]火烈鸟(形体似鹤,有粉红色,深红色和黑色羽毛)
examples: We met at a bar called the Flamingo.
A flamingo can sleep while standing on one leg.
I say, John, I see your flamingo with the broken leg!
The singer dived into working on Flamingo following the death of his mother earlier this year.
Alize is located at the top of the Palms at 4321 W. Flamingo Rd.
